description.para: The first 13 words are used by hardware.
All words after the 13rd word are for software use only.

briefdescription.para: Prevent circular inclusions by using protection macros.
BD specific bytes to be cleared.
This macro reads the given register.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the MCDMA core.
is the register offset of the register.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: u32 XMcdma_ReadReg(u32 BaseAddress, u32 RegOffset)

briefdescription.para: This macro writes the value into the given register.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the MCDMA core.
is the register offset of the register.
is the 32-bit value to write to the register.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XMcdma_WriteReg(u32 BaseAddress, u32 RegOffset, u32 Data)
